market_pulse: Competitive weekend DJ lineups ramping up across Wynn, Caesars, and MGM properties; Zouk and OMNIA leading with high-engagement artist announcements; LIV maintaining strong social presence with recent Metro Boomin, Crank Dat, and Simp City events.

content_gaps.description: Viral TikTok audio trends for dayclub/nightlife content - competitors using trending sounds for reels while LIV relies more on traditional post formats

content_gaps.description: Behind-the-scenes content from staff/DJ perspectives - competitors publishing more BTS moments than LIV's current strategy
